zh.Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, England: 英國爾桑頓 勒 波斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Hatton於1258年出生在英國英格蘭爾哈頓時，她的父親Adam de Hatton30歲，母親Maud Matilda de Bretargh23歲。她和Alan de Acton of Hellesby至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1310年在英國爾哈頓享年52歲。

zh-hans.Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, England: 英国爾桑頓 勒 波斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix Hatton于1258年出生在英国英格兰爾哈頓时，她的父亲Adam de Hatton30岁，母亲Maud Matilda de Bretargh23岁。她和Alan de Acton of Hellesby至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1310年在英国爾哈頓享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

variants.name: Hatten
meanings: English: variant of   Hatton  . This surname is also common among African Americans.
North German: habitational name from the name of an area of marshland between Oldenburg and Bremen.

variants.name: Hattan
meanings: English and Scottish (Argyll): variant of   Hatton  .

variants.name: Aton
meanings: variant of Hatton , with loss of initial H-.
topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)).

variants.name: Heath
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(on the) heath’ (Middle English he(a)th, Old English hǣth) or else a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. The same word also denoted heather, the characteristic plant of heathland areas. This surname has also been established in Dublin, Ireland, since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Hatton was born in 1258, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Adam de Hatton, was 30 and her mother, Maud Matilda de Bretargh, was 23. She had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Alan de Acton of Hellesby. She died in 1310, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix Hatton est née en 1258, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Hatton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud Matilda de Bretargh, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Alan de Acton of Hellesby. Elle est décédée en 1310, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix Hatton 1258 in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Hatton 30 und ihre Mutter Maud Matilda de Bretargh 23. Sie hatte mit Alan de Acton of Hellesby mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1310 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Hatton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Hatton è nata il nel 1258 nel Hatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Adam de Hatton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Maud Matilda de Bretargh, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Alan de Acton of Hellesby. Morì nel 1310, nel Hatton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Hattonが1258年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Adam de Hattonは30歳，母Maud Matilda de Bretarghは23歳であった。彼女はAlan de Acton of Hellesbyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1310年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Hatton(이)가 1258년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Hatton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Matilda de Bretargh(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Alan de Acton of Hellesby(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Alan de Acton of Hellesby. Ela faleceu em 1310, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Hatton родилась в 1258 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Adam de Hatton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Matilda de Bretargh, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Alan de Acton of Hellesby. Она умерла в 1310 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix Hatton nació en 1258, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam de Hatton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maud Matilda de Bretargh, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Alan de Acton of Hellesby. Murió en 1310, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
